name: Blades Golf Lounge
address: 24 W Camelback Rd Suite C, Phoenix, AZ 85013
about: Blades Golf Lounge is an indoor golf simulator venue in Phoenix, Arizona, featuring Foresight Falcon technology—the same camera-based system trusted by PGA, LPGA, and LIV tour professionals. The facility blends retro-modern aesthetics with Scottish golf club influences, offering a 24/7 accessible space with free parking. It operates on a mixed model, offering both hourly pay-as-you-go sessions and founding memberships that provide unlimited access. The venue is designed for both serious golfers seeking advanced data tracking and casual players looking for a relaxed, modern atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Foresight Falcon camera-based simulator technology
24/7 member access with booking via Birrdi and unique access codes
Ability to play with your own golf ball for authentic feedback
Comprehensive data tracking including ball speed, spin, and club path
Retro-modern lounge environment with free parking

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy allows guests to bring their own food and drinks
BYOB policy allows guests to bring their own alcohol

simulator_hardware.notes: Camera-based simulator trusted by PGA, LPGA, and LIV tour professionals; allows use of personal golf balls

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs to get the most accurate data tracking, as the Foresight Falcon system allows you to play with your personal golf ball and equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Blades Golf Lounge operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, allowing guests to bring their own food and drinks to enjoy during their session.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard tee times are available in 60-minute increments, with up to 3-hour tee times offered for members, allowing flexibility for both quick sessions and longer play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention kid-friendly features in its provided information, so it is unclear whether it is designed or suitable for children.
